heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 12377 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1990section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 101–501section 8621 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1990section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 101–501section 8621 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary, for each of the fiscal years 1993 and 1994, to carry out this subchapter. Sums appropriated under this subsection shall remain available until the expiration of the 1-year period beginning on the date the Conference is adjourned. New spending authority or authority to enter into contracts as provided in this subchapter shall be effective only to the extent and in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Return of unexpended funds
children.label: b Return of unexpended funds
children.text: Any funds remaining upon the expiration of the 1-year period referred to in subsection (a) shall be returned to the Treasury of the United States and credited as miscellaneous receipts.
